name: Email Collection Activity
description: Detects bulk access to email or unusual email export activity
query:
// Email Collection Detection
// Bulk email access or export
events from email
where event_type in ("mailbox_export", "email_forward_rule_created")
  or (event_type = "email_access" and access_type = "delegate")
group by username, target_mailbox
having count(*) > 50
within 300 seconds
